enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Minnal Oru Kodi expresses deep emotions of love and longing, portraying the beauty of romantic relationships.

In which movie does this song appear?

The song is featured in the movie VIP.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by Hariharan and K.S. Chithra.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Minnal Oru Kodi was composed by A.R. Rahman.

When was this song released?

This song was released on June 16, 1997.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Minnal Oru Kodi, the protagonists express their love through poetic lyrics and melodious tunes. The song beautifully captures the essence of longing and affection, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. Its soothing melody, combined with the heartfelt performances of Hariharan and K.S. Chithra, evokes a sense of nostalgia. This timeless classic remains a favorite among fans of Tamil cinema and music.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Minnal Oru Kodi from VIP is a mesmerizing duet that captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Hariharan and K.S. Chithra, paired with A.R. Rahman's magical composition, this song transports listeners to a world of romance. Experience the soothing melodies and heartfelt lyrics that make this track a timeless classic.
stanzaMeanings: A lightning bolt has come searching for me, oh, many beautiful flowers bloom together with your sweet words.
Silence speaks, the cool breeze blows, oh queen searching for love, you are my love goddess...
The coolness and the rain surround me, my body and soul are now alone, alone.
The moonlight calls me beautifully, today is it right to separate?
If you are water, I become rain; if you call, I seek my life...
Until my last breath, I come to you, oh, love has not come, my body gives me your words for life.
In the rain, I get drenched like a flower, my heart has thought of you, I am in your thoughts.
The world embraces like a beautiful dream, you are my soul and life.
You have made me a musician, you have lifted me, my life is yours.
A lightning bolt has come searching for your life, oh, many beautiful flowers bloom together with your sweet words.
Silence speaks, the cool breeze blows, oh queen searching for love, you are my love goddess...
